name: @erfianugrah/pi-loop
description: Sensor-gated, self-correcting loop driver for pi. Language-agnostic: drives a fresh `pi -p` each iteration until the sensors pass. Sensors span computational (build/lint/test/typecheck/structural/security/browser-DOM) and inferential (LLM-as-judge on the diff; vision judge + baseline pixel-diff for UI/UX). Ships a governor (model-escalation ladder, git checkpoint/rollback, write-scope) plus dependency-free headless-Chromium, judge, and visual-regression sensors.
author: Erfi Anugrah
